
### Estimating survival in datasets without censoring

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_exm-km-no-cens-intro.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

### Estimating survival in datasets with censoring

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-surv-KM-censoring-intro.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_def-km-estimator.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-km-product-limit-math.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_exr-nonparametric-survival.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_thm-KM-est-no-cens.qmd >}}

### Kaplan-Meier curve for `drug6mp` data

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-surv-KM-6mp-curve.qmd >}}

### Kaplan-Meier calculations {.smaller}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_sec-surv-KM-6mp-calcs.qmd >}}

{{< slidebreak >}}

{{< include _subfiles/intro-to-survival-analysis/_exr_survival_prediction_intervals.qmd >}}
